text: Remember back in school when you had to
do some class presentation? Only when it
got to the day and the other kids

totally misunderstood the assignment and

only option was to hide at the back of
the class and just hope against hope
that the teacher would forget about you
and let you off the hook. Well, that's

before it was even released, lumbered

or wanted. And the fact that the past
